References ANIMIMPLICITSTATE_INAIR, autocvar_cl_bobmodel_side, autocvar_cl_bobmodel_speed, autocvar_cl_bobmodel_up, autocvar_cl_viewmodel_scale, bound(), cos(), frametime, max(), min(), sin(), time, vec2, vector(), and vlen().

Referenced by viewmodel_animate().

209 {
210  bool clonground = !(view.anim_implicit_state & ANIMIMPLICITSTATE_INAIR);
211  static bool oldonground;
212  static float hitgroundtime;
213  if (clonground)
214  {
215  float f = time; // cl.movecmd[0].time
216  if (!oldonground)
217  hitgroundtime = f;
218  }
219  oldonground = clonground;
220 
221  // calculate for swinging gun model
222  // the gun bobs when running on the ground, but doesn't bob when you're in the air.
223  vector gunorg = '0 0 0';
224  static float bobmodel_scale = 0;
225  static float time_ofs = 0; // makes the effect always restart in the same way
226  if (clonground)
227  {
228  if (time - hitgroundtime > 0.05)
229  bobmodel_scale = min(1, bobmodel_scale + frametime * 5);
230  }
231  else
232  bobmodel_scale = max(0, bobmodel_scale - frametime * 5);
233 
234  float xyspeed = bound(0, vlen(vec2(view.velocity)), 400);
235  if (bobmodel_scale && xyspeed)
236  {
237  float bspeed = xyspeed * 0.01 * autocvar_cl_viewmodel_scale * bobmodel_scale;
238  float s = (time - time_ofs) * autocvar_cl_bobmodel_speed;
239  gunorg.y = bspeed * autocvar_cl_bobmodel_side * sin(s);
240  gunorg.z = bspeed * autocvar_cl_bobmodel_up * cos(s * 2);
241  }
242  else
243  time_ofs = time;
244 
245  return gunorg;
246 }

Referenced by Hud_Dynamic_Frame(), and viewmodel_animate().

118 {
119  if(cl_followmodel_time == time)
120  return; // cl_followmodel_ofs already calculated for this frame
121 
122  float frac;
123  vector gunorg = '0 0 0';
124  static vector vel_average;
125  static vector gunorg_prev = '0 0 0';
126  static vector gunorg_adjustment_highpass;
127  static vector gunorg_adjustment_lowpass;
128 
129  vector vel;
130  if (autocvar_cl_followmodel_velocity_absolute)
131  vel = view.velocity;
132  else
133  {
134  vector forward = '0 0 0', right = '0 0 0', up = '0 0 0';
135  MAKEVECTORS(makevectors, view_angles, forward, right, up);
136  vel.x = view.velocity * forward;
137  vel.y = view.velocity * right * -1;
138  vel.z = view.velocity * up;
139  }
140 
141  vel.x = bound(vel_average.x - autocvar_cl_followmodel_limit, vel.x, vel_average.x + autocvar_cl_followmodel_limit);
142  vel.y = bound(vel_average.y - autocvar_cl_followmodel_limit, vel.y, vel_average.y + autocvar_cl_followmodel_limit);
143  vel.z = bound(vel_average.z - autocvar_cl_followmodel_limit, vel.z, vel_average.z + autocvar_cl_followmodel_limit);
144 
145  frac = avg_factor(autocvar_cl_followmodel_velocity_lowpass);
146  lowpass3(vel, frac, vel_average, gunorg);
147 
148  gunorg *= -autocvar_cl_followmodel_speed * 0.042;
149 
150  // perform highpass/lowpass on the adjustment vectors (turning velocity into acceleration!)
151  // trick: we must do the lowpass LAST, so the lowpass vector IS the final vector!
152  frac = avg_factor(autocvar_cl_followmodel_highpass);
153  highpass3(gunorg, frac, gunorg_adjustment_highpass, gunorg);
154  frac = avg_factor(autocvar_cl_followmodel_lowpass);
155  lowpass3(gunorg, frac, gunorg_adjustment_lowpass, gunorg);
156 
157  if (autocvar_cl_followmodel_velocity_absolute)
158  {
159  vector fixed_gunorg;
160  vector forward = '0 0 0', right = '0 0 0', up = '0 0 0';
161  MAKEVECTORS(makevectors, view_angles, forward, right, up);
162  fixed_gunorg.x = gunorg * forward;
163  fixed_gunorg.y = gunorg * right * -1;
164  fixed_gunorg.z = gunorg * up;
165  gunorg = fixed_gunorg;
166  }
167 
168  cl_followmodel_ofs = gunorg;
169  cl_followmodel_time = time;
170 }

863  if(this != WEP_Null && hud == HUD_NORMAL)

866  break;

872  {

875  //x = red
876  //y = green
877  //z = blue
878 
879  wcross_color.z = 0;
880

882  {
883  wcross_color.x = 0;
884  wcross_color.y = 1;
885  }
886  else if(x > 150)
887  {
888  wcross_color.x = 0.4 - (x-150)*0.02 * 0.4;
889  wcross_color.y = 0.9 + (x-150)*0.02 * 0.1;
890  }
891  else if(x > 100)
892  {
893  wcross_color.x = 1 - (x-100)*0.02 * 0.6;
894  wcross_color.y = 1 - (x-100)*0.02 * 0.1;
895  wcross_color.z = 1 - (x-100)*0.02;

897  else if(x > 50)
898  {
899  wcross_color.x = 1;
900  wcross_color.y = 1;
901  wcross_color.z = 0.2 + (x-50)*0.02 * 0.8;
902  }
903  else if(x > 20)
904  {
905  wcross_color.x = 1;
906  wcross_color.y = (x-20)*90/27/100;
907  wcross_color.z = (x-20)*90/27/100 * 0.2;
908  }
909  else
910  {
911  wcross_color.x = 1;
912  wcross_color.y = 0;
913  }
914  break;
915  }
916 
917  case 3: // crosshair_color_rainbow
918  {
919  if(time >= rainbow_last_flicker)
920  {
921  rainbow_prev_color = randomvec() * autocvar_crosshair_color_special_rainbow_brightness;
922  rainbow_last_flicker = time + autocvar_crosshair_color_special_rainbow_delay;
923  }
924  wcross_color = rainbow_prev_color;
925  break;
926  }
927 LABEL(normalcolor)
928  default: { wcross_color = stov(autocvar_crosshair_color); break; }
929  }
930 
931  return wcross_color;
932 }

vector randomvec(void)

2281  current_angles = '0 0 0';
2282  camera_direction = '0 0 0';

2285  camera_offset.y += 30 * -sin(current_angles.y * DEG2RAD);

2287  current_camera_offset = camera_offset;
2288  cvar_set("camera_reset", "0");
2289  camera_mode = CAMERA_CHASE;

2292  // Camera angles
2293  if( camera_roll )
2294  mouse_angles.z += camera_roll * autocvar_camera_speed_roll;
2295 
2296  if(autocvar_camera_look_player)
2297  {
2298  vector dir;
2299  float n;
2300 
2301  dir = normalize(view_origin - current_position);
2302  n = mouse_angles.z;
2303  mouse_angles = vectoangles(dir);
2304  mouse_angles.x = mouse_angles.x * -1;
2305  mouse_angles.z = n;
2306  }
2307  else
2308  {
2309  tmp = getmousepos() * 0.1;
2310  if(vdist(tmp, >, autocvar_camera_mouse_threshold))
2311  {
2312  mouse_angles.x += tmp.y * cos(mouse_angles.z * DEG2RAD) + (tmp.x * sin(mouse_angles.z * DEG2RAD));
2313  mouse_angles.y -= tmp.x * cos(mouse_angles.z * DEG2RAD) + (tmp.y * -sin(mouse_angles.z * DEG2RAD));
2314  }
2315  }
2316 
2317  while (mouse_angles.x < -180) mouse_angles.x = mouse_angles.x + 360;
2318  while (mouse_angles.x > 180) mouse_angles.x = mouse_angles.x - 360;
2319  while (mouse_angles.y < -180) mouse_angles.y = mouse_angles.y + 360;
2320  while (mouse_angles.y > 180) mouse_angles.y = mouse_angles.y - 360;
2321 
2322  // Fix difference when angles don't have the same sign
2323  delta = '0 0 0';
2324  if(mouse_angles.y < -60 && current_angles.y > 60)
2325  delta = '0 360 0';
2326  if(mouse_angles.y > 60 && current_angles.y < -60)
2327  delta = '0 -360 0';
2328 
2329  if(autocvar_camera_look_player)
2330  attenuation = autocvar_camera_look_attenuation;
2331  else
2332  attenuation = autocvar_camera_speed_attenuation;
2333 
2334  attenuation = 1 / max(1, attenuation);
2335  current_angles += (mouse_angles - current_angles + delta) * attenuation;
2336 
2337  while (current_angles.x < -180) current_angles.x = current_angles.x + 360;
2338  while (current_angles.x > 180) current_angles.x = current_angles.x - 360;
2339  while (current_angles.y < -180) current_angles.y = current_angles.y + 360;
2340  while (current_angles.y > 180) current_angles.y = current_angles.y - 360;
2341 
2342  // Camera position
2343  tmp = '0 0 0';
2344  dimensions = 0;
2345 
2346  if( camera_direction.x )
2347  {
2348  tmp.x = camera_direction.x * cos(current_angles.y * DEG2RAD);
2349  tmp.y = camera_direction.x * sin(current_angles.y * DEG2RAD);
2350  if( autocvar_camera_forward_follows && !autocvar_camera_look_player )
2351  tmp.z = camera_direction.x * -sin(current_angles.x * DEG2RAD);
2352  ++dimensions;
2353  }
2354 
2355  if( camera_direction.y )
2356  {
2357  tmp.x += camera_direction.y * -sin(current_angles.y * DEG2RAD);
2358  tmp.y += camera_direction.y * cos(current_angles.y * DEG2RAD) * cos(current_angles.z * DEG2RAD);
2359  tmp.z += camera_direction.y * sin(current_angles.z * DEG2RAD);
2360  ++dimensions;
2361  }
2362 
2363  if( camera_direction.z )
2364  {
2365  tmp.z += camera_direction.z * cos(current_angles.z * DEG2RAD);
2366  ++dimensions;
2367  }
2368 
2369  if(autocvar_camera_free)
2370  speed = autocvar_camera_speed_free;
2371  else
2372  speed = autocvar_camera_speed_chase;
2373 
2374  if(dimensions)
2375  {
2376  speed = speed * sqrt(1 / dimensions);
2377  camera_offset += tmp * speed;
2378  }
2379

2381 
2382  // Camera modes
2383  if( autocvar_camera_free )
2384  {
2385  if ( camera_mode == CAMERA_CHASE )
2386  {
2387  current_camera_offset = current_origin + current_camera_offset;
2388  camera_offset = current_origin + camera_offset;
2389  }
2390 
2391  camera_mode = CAMERA_FREE;
2392  current_position = current_camera_offset;
2393  }
2394  else
2395  {
2396  if ( camera_mode == CAMERA_FREE )
2397  {
2398  current_origin = view_origin;
2399  camera_offset = camera_offset - current_origin;
2400  current_camera_offset = current_camera_offset - current_origin;
2401  }
2402 
2403  camera_mode = CAMERA_CHASE;

2406  current_origin += (view_origin - current_origin) * attenuation;

2408  current_origin = view_origin;
2409 
2410  current_position = current_origin + current_camera_offset;

1388 {
1389  TC(int, w); TC(int, h);
1390  entity e;
1391  float fov;
1392  float f;
1393  vector vf_size, vf_min;
1394  float a;
1395 
1396  execute_next_frame();
1397 
1398  ++framecount;
1399 
1400  stats_get();
1401  hud = STAT(HUD);
1402 
1403  if(hud != HUD_NORMAL && lasthud == HUD_NORMAL)
1404  vh_notice_time = time + autocvar_cl_vehicles_notify_time;
1405 
1406  lasthud = hud;
1407 
1408  HUD_Scale_Disable();
1409 
1410  if(autocvar__hud_showbinds_reload) // menu can set this one
1411  {
1412  db_close(binddb);
1413  binddb = db_create();
1414  cvar_set("_hud_showbinds_reload", "0");
1415  }
1416 
1417  if(checkextension("DP_CSQC_MINFPS_QUALITY"))
1418  view_quality = getproperty(VF_MINFPS_QUALITY);
1419  else
1420  view_quality = 1;
1421 
1422  button_attack2 = PHYS_INPUT_BUTTON_ATCK2(this);
1423  button_zoom = PHYS_INPUT_BUTTON_ZOOM(this);
1424 
1425  vf_size = getpropertyvec(VF_SIZE);
1426  vf_min = getpropertyvec(VF_MIN);
1427  vid_width = vf_size.x;
1428  vid_height = vf_size.y;
1429 
1430  vector reticle_pos = '0 0 0', reticle_size = '0 0 0';
1431  vector splash_pos = '0 0 0', splash_size = '0 0 0';
1432 
1433  WaypointSprite_Load();
1434 
1435  CSQCPlayer_SetCamera();
1436 
1437  if(player_localentnum <= maxclients) // is it a client?
1438  current_player = player_localentnum - 1;
1439  else // then player_localentnum is the vehicle I'm driving
1440  current_player = player_localnum;
1441  myteam = entcs_GetTeam(current_player);
1442 
1443  if(myteam != prev_myteam)
1444  {
1445  myteamcolors = colormapPaletteColor(myteam, 1);
1446  FOREACH(hud_panels, true, it.update_time = time);
1447  prev_myteam = myteam;
1448  }
1449 
1450  ticrate = STAT(MOVEVARS_TICRATE) * STAT(MOVEVARS_TIMESCALE);
1451 
1452  float is_dead = (STAT(HEALTH) <= 0);
1453 
1454  // FIXME do we need this hack?
1455  if(isdemo())
1456  {
1457  // in demos, input_buttons do not work
1458  button_zoom = (autocvar__togglezoom == "-");
1459  }
1460  else if(button_zoom
1461  && autocvar_cl_unpress_zoom_on_death
1462  && (spectatee_status >= 0)
1463  && (is_dead || intermission))
1464  {
1465  // no zoom while dead or in intermission please
1466  localcmd("-zoom\n");
1467  button_zoom = false;
1468  }
1469 
1470  // event chase camera
1471  if(autocvar_chase_active <= 0) // greater than 0 means it's enabled manually, and this code is skipped
1472  {
1473  if(STAT(CAMERA_SPECTATOR))
1474  {
1475  if(spectatee_status > 0)
1476  {
1477  if(!autocvar_chase_active)
1478  {
1479  cvar_set("chase_active", "-2");
1480  goto skip_eventchase_death;
1481  }
1482  }
1483  else if(autocvar_chase_active == -2)
1484  cvar_set("chase_active", "0");
1485 
1486  if(autocvar_chase_active == -2)
1487  goto skip_eventchase_death;
1488  }
1489  else if(autocvar_chase_active == -2)
1490  cvar_set("chase_active", "0");
1491 
1492  float vehicle_chase = (hud != HUD_NORMAL && (autocvar_cl_eventchase_vehicle || spectatee_status > 0));
1493 
1494  float vehicle_viewdist = 0;
1495  vector vehicle_viewofs = '0 0 0';
1496 
1497  if(vehicle_chase)
1498  {
1499  if(hud != HUD_BUMBLEBEE_GUN)
1500  {
1501  Vehicle info = Vehicles_from(hud);
1502  vehicle_viewdist = info.height;
1503  vehicle_viewofs = info.view_ofs;
1504  }
1505  }
1506 
1507  if(WantEventchase(this))
1508  {
1509  vector current_view_origin_override = '0 0 0';
1510  vector view_offset_override = '0 0 0';
1511  float chase_distance_override = 0;
1512  bool custom_eventchase = MUTATOR_CALLHOOK(CustomizeEventchase, this);
1513  if(custom_eventchase)
1514  {
1515  current_view_origin_override = M_ARGV(0, vector);
1516  view_offset_override = M_ARGV(1, vector);
1517  chase_distance_override = M_ARGV(0, float);
1518  }
1519  eventchase_running = true;
1520 
1521  entity local_player = ((csqcplayer) ? csqcplayer : CSQCModel_server2csqc(player_localentnum - 1));
1522  if(!local_player)
1523  local_player = this; // fall back!
1524 
1525  // make special vector since we can't use view_origin (It is one frame old as of this code, it gets set later with the results this code makes.)
1526  vector current_view_origin = (csqcplayer ? csqcplayer.origin : pmove_org);
1527  if (custom_eventchase)
1528  current_view_origin = current_view_origin_override;
1529 
1530  // detect maximum viewoffset and use it
1531  vector view_offset = autocvar_cl_eventchase_viewoffset;
1532  if(vehicle_chase)
1533  {
1534  if(vehicle_viewofs)
1535  view_offset = vehicle_viewofs;
1536  else
1537  view_offset = autocvar_cl_eventchase_vehicle_viewoffset;
1538  }
1539  if (custom_eventchase)
1540  view_offset = view_offset_override;
1541 
1542  if(view_offset)
1543  {
1544  WarpZone_TraceLine(current_view_origin, current_view_origin + view_offset + ('0 0 1' * autocvar_cl_eventchase_maxs.z), MOVE_WORLDONLY, this);
1545  if(trace_fraction == 1) { current_view_origin += view_offset; }
1546  else { current_view_origin.z += max(0, (trace_endpos.z - current_view_origin.z) - autocvar_cl_eventchase_maxs.z); }
1547  }
1548 
1549  // We must enable chase_active to get a third person view (weapon viewmodel hidden and own player model showing).
1550  // Ideally, there should be another way to enable third person cameras, such as through setproperty()
1551  // -1 enables chase_active while marking it as set by this code, and not by the user (which would be 1)
1552  if(!autocvar_chase_active) { cvar_set("chase_active", "-1"); }
1553 
1554  // make the camera smooth back
1555  float chase_distance = autocvar_cl_eventchase_distance;
1556  if(vehicle_chase)
1557  {
1558  if(vehicle_viewofs)
1559  chase_distance = vehicle_viewdist;
1560  else
1561  chase_distance = autocvar_cl_eventchase_vehicle_distance;
1562  }
1563  if (custom_eventchase)
1564  chase_distance = chase_distance_override;
1565 
1566  if(autocvar_cl_eventchase_speed && eventchase_current_distance < chase_distance)
1567  eventchase_current_distance += autocvar_cl_eventchase_speed * (chase_distance - eventchase_current_distance) * frametime; // slow down the further we get
1568  else if(eventchase_current_distance != chase_distance)
1569  eventchase_current_distance = chase_distance;
1570 
1571  makevectors(view_angles);
1572 
1573  vector eventchase_target_origin = (current_view_origin - (v_forward * eventchase_current_distance));
1574  WarpZone_TraceBox(current_view_origin, autocvar_cl_eventchase_mins, autocvar_cl_eventchase_maxs, eventchase_target_origin, MOVE_WORLDONLY, this);
1575 
1576  // If the boxtrace fails, revert back to line tracing.
1577  if(!local_player.viewloc)
1578  if(trace_startsolid)
1579  {
1580  eventchase_target_origin = (current_view_origin - (v_forward * eventchase_current_distance));
1581  WarpZone_TraceLine(current_view_origin, eventchase_target_origin, MOVE_WORLDONLY, this);
1582  setproperty(VF_ORIGIN, (trace_endpos - (v_forward * autocvar_cl_eventchase_mins.z)));
1583  }
1584  else { setproperty(VF_ORIGIN, trace_endpos); }
1585 
1586  if(!local_player.viewloc)
1587  setproperty(VF_ANGLES, WarpZone_TransformVAngles(WarpZone_trace_transform, view_angles));
1588  }
1589  else if(autocvar_chase_active < 0) // time to disable chase_active if it was set by this code
1590  {
1591  eventchase_running = false;
1592  cvar_set("chase_active", "0");
1593  eventchase_current_distance = 0; // start from 0 next time
1594  }
1595  }
1596  // workaround for camera stuck between player's legs when using chase_active 1
1597  // because the engine stops updating the chase_active camera when the game ends
1598  else if(intermission)
1599  {
1600  cvar_settemp("chase_active", "-1");
1601  eventchase_current_distance = 0;
1602  }
1603 
1604  LABEL(skip_eventchase_death);
1605 
1606  // do lockview after event chase camera so that it still applies whenever necessary.
1607  if(autocvar_cl_lockview || (!autocvar_hud_cursormode && (autocvar__hud_configure && spectatee_status <= 0 || intermission > 1 || QuickMenu_IsOpened())))
1608  {
1609  setproperty(VF_ORIGIN, freeze_org);
1610  setproperty(VF_ANGLES, freeze_ang);
1611  }
1612  else
1613  {
1614  freeze_org = getpropertyvec(VF_ORIGIN);
1615  freeze_ang = getpropertyvec(VF_ANGLES);
1616  }
1617 
1618  WarpZone_FixView();
1619  //WarpZone_FixPMove();
1620 
1621  vector ov_org = '0 0 0';
1622  vector ov_mid = '0 0 0';
1623  vector ov_worldmin = '0 0 0';
1624  vector ov_worldmax = '0 0 0';
1625  if(autocvar_cl_orthoview)
1626  {
1627  ov_worldmin = mi_picmin;
1628  ov_worldmax = mi_picmax;
1629 
1630  float ov_width = (ov_worldmax.x - ov_worldmin.x);
1631  float ov_height = (ov_worldmax.y - ov_worldmin.y);
1632  float ov_distance = (max(vid_width, vid_height) * max(ov_width, ov_height));
1633 
1634  ov_mid = ((ov_worldmax + ov_worldmin) * 0.5);
1635  ov_org = vec3(ov_mid.x, ov_mid.y, (ov_mid.z + ov_distance));
1636 
1637  float ov_nearest = vlen(ov_org - vec3(
1638  bound(ov_worldmin.x, ov_org.x, ov_worldmax.x),
1639  bound(ov_worldmin.y, ov_org.y, ov_worldmax.y),
1640  bound(ov_worldmin.z, ov_org.z, ov_worldmax.z)
1641  ));
1642 
1643  float ov_furthest = 0;
1644  float dist = 0;
1645 
1646  if((dist = vdist((vec3(ov_worldmin.x, ov_worldmin.y, ov_worldmin.z) - ov_org), >, ov_furthest))) { ov_furthest = dist; }
1647  if((dist = vdist((vec3(ov_worldmax.x, ov_worldmin.y, ov_worldmin.z) - ov_org), >, ov_furthest))) { ov_furthest = dist; }
1648  if((dist = vdist((vec3(ov_worldmin.x, ov_worldmax.y, ov_worldmin.z) - ov_org), >, ov_furthest))) { ov_furthest = dist; }
1649  if((dist = vdist((vec3(ov_worldmin.x, ov_worldmin.y, ov_worldmax.z) - ov_org), >, ov_furthest))) { ov_furthest = dist; }
1650  if((dist = vdist((vec3(ov_worldmax.x, ov_worldmax.y, ov_worldmin.z) - ov_org), >, ov_furthest))) { ov_furthest = dist; }
1651  if((dist = vdist((vec3(ov_worldmin.x, ov_worldmax.y, ov_worldmax.z) - ov_org), >, ov_furthest))) { ov_furthest = dist; }
1652  if((dist = vdist((vec3(ov_worldmax.x, ov_worldmin.y, ov_worldmax.z) - ov_org), >, ov_furthest))) { ov_furthest = dist; }
1653  if((dist = vdist((vec3(ov_worldmax.x, ov_worldmax.y, ov_worldmax.z) - ov_org), >, ov_furthest))) { ov_furthest = dist; }
1654 
1655  if(!ov_enabled)
1656  {
1657  oldr_nearclip = cvar("r_nearclip");
1658  oldr_farclip_base = cvar("r_farclip_base");
1659  oldr_farclip_world = cvar("r_farclip_world");
1660  oldr_novis = cvar("r_novis");
1661  oldr_useportalculling = cvar("r_useportalculling");
1662  oldr_useinfinitefarclip = cvar("r_useinfinitefarclip");
1663  }
1664 
1665  cvar_settemp("r_nearclip", ftos(ov_nearest));
1666  cvar_settemp("r_farclip_base", ftos(ov_furthest));
1667  cvar_settemp("r_farclip_world", "0");
1668  cvar_settemp("r_novis", "1");
1669  cvar_settemp("r_useportalculling", "0");
1670  cvar_settemp("r_useinfinitefarclip", "0");
1671 
1672  setproperty(VF_ORIGIN, ov_org);
1673  setproperty(VF_ANGLES, '90 0 0');
1674 
1675  ov_enabled = true;
1676 
1677  #if 0
1678  LOG_INFOF("OrthoView: org = %s, angles = %s, distance = %f, nearest = %f, furthest = %f\n",
1679  vtos(ov_org),
1680  vtos(getpropertyvec(VF_ANGLES)),
1681  ov_distance,
1682  ov_nearest,
1683  ov_furthest);
1684  #endif
1685  }
1686  else
1687  {
1688  if(ov_enabled)
1689  {
1690  cvar_set("r_nearclip", ftos(oldr_nearclip));
1691  cvar_set("r_farclip_base", ftos(oldr_farclip_base));
1692  cvar_set("r_farclip_world", ftos(oldr_farclip_world));
1693  cvar_set("r_novis", ftos(oldr_novis));
1694  cvar_set("r_useportalculling", ftos(oldr_useportalculling));
1695  cvar_set("r_useinfinitefarclip", ftos(oldr_useinfinitefarclip));
1696  }
1697  ov_enabled = false;
1698  }
1699 
1700  // run viewmodel_draw before updating view_angles to the angles calculated by WarpZone_FixView
1701  // viewmodel_draw needs to use the view_angles set by the engine on every CSQC_UpdateView call
1702  viewmodel_draw(viewmodel);
1703 
1704  // Render the Scene
1705  view_origin = getpropertyvec(VF_ORIGIN);
1706  view_angles = getpropertyvec(VF_ANGLES);
1707  makevectors(view_angles);
1708  view_forward = v_forward;
1709  view_right = v_right;
1710  view_up = v_up;
1711 
1712 #ifdef BLURTEST
1713  if(time > blurtest_time0 && time < blurtest_time1)
1714  {
1715  float r, t;
1716 
1717  t = (time - blurtest_time0) / (blurtest_time1 - blurtest_time0);
1718  r = t * blurtest_radius;
1719  f = 1 / pow(t, blurtest_power) - 1;
1720 
1721  cvar_set("r_glsl_postprocess", "1");
1722  cvar_set("r_glsl_postprocess_uservec1", strcat(ftos(r), " ", ftos(f), " 0 0"));
1723  }
1724  else
1725  {
1726  cvar_set("r_glsl_postprocess", "0");
1727  cvar_set("r_glsl_postprocess_uservec1", "0 0 0 0");
1728  }
1729 #endif
1730 
1731  TargetMusic_Advance();
1732  Fog_Force();
1733 
1734  if(drawtime == 0)
1735  drawframetime = 0.01666667; // when we don't know fps yet, we assume 60fps
1736  else
1737  drawframetime = bound(0.000001, time - drawtime, 1);
1738  drawtime = time;
1739 
1740  // watch for gametype changes here...
1741  // in ParseStuffCMD the cmd isn't executed yet :/
1742  // might even be better to add the gametype to TE_CSQC_INIT...?
1743  if(!postinit)
1744  PostInit();
1745 
1746  if(intermission && !gameover_time)
1747  gameover_time = time;
1748 
1749  if(intermission && !isdemo() && !(calledhooks & HOOK_END))
1750  {
1751  if(calledhooks & HOOK_START)
1752  {
1753  localcmd("\ncl_hook_gameend\n");
1754  calledhooks |= HOOK_END;
1755  }
1756  }
1757 
1758  Announcer();
1759 
1760  fov = autocvar_fov;
1761  if(fov <= 59.5)
1762  {
1763  if(!zoomscript_caught)
1764  {
1765  localcmd("+button9\n");
1766  zoomscript_caught = 1;
1767  }
1768  }
1769  else
1770  {
1771  if(zoomscript_caught)
1772  {
1773  localcmd("-button9\n");
1774  zoomscript_caught = 0;
1775  }
1776  }
1777 
1778  ColorTranslateMode = autocvar_cl_stripcolorcodes;
1779 
1780  // currently switching-to weapon (for crosshair)
1781  switchingweapon = Weapons_from(STAT(SWITCHINGWEAPON));
1782 
1783  // actually active weapon (for zoom)
1784  activeweapon = Weapons_from(STAT(ACTIVEWEAPON));
1785 
1786  switchweapon = Weapons_from(STAT(SWITCHWEAPON));
1787 
1788  if(last_switchweapon != switchweapon)
1789  {
1790  weapontime = time;
1791  last_switchweapon = switchweapon;
1792  if(button_zoom && autocvar_cl_unpress_zoom_on_weapon_switch)
1793  {
1794  localcmd("-zoom\n");
1795  button_zoom = false;
1796  }
1797  if(autocvar_cl_unpress_attack_on_weapon_switch)
1798  {
1799  localcmd("-fire\n");
1800  localcmd("-fire2\n");
1801  button_attack2 = false;
1802  }
1803  }
1804  if(last_activeweapon != activeweapon)
1805  {
1806  last_activeweapon = activeweapon;
1807 
1808  e = activeweapon;
1809  if(e.netname != "")
1810  localcmd(strcat("\ncl_hook_activeweapon ", e.netname), "\n");
1811  else
1812  localcmd("\ncl_hook_activeweapon none\n");
1813  }
1814 
1815  // ALWAYS Clear Current Scene First
1816  clearscene();
1817 
1818  setproperty(VF_ORIGIN, view_origin);
1819  setproperty(VF_ANGLES, view_angles);
1820 
1821  // FIXME engine bug? VF_SIZE and VF_MIN are not restored to sensible values by this
1822  setproperty(VF_SIZE, vf_size);
1823  setproperty(VF_MIN, vf_min);
1824 
1825  // Assign Standard Viewflags
1826  // Draw the World (and sky)
1827  setproperty(VF_DRAWWORLD, 1);
1828 
1829  // Set the console size vars
1830  vid_conwidth = autocvar_vid_conwidth;
1831  vid_conheight = autocvar_vid_conheight;
1832  vid_pixelheight = autocvar_vid_pixelheight;
1833 
1834  if(autocvar_cl_orthoview) { setproperty(VF_FOV, GetOrthoviewFOV(ov_worldmin, ov_worldmax, ov_mid, ov_org)); }
1835  else if(csqcplayer.viewloc) { setproperty(VF_FOV, GetViewLocationFOV(110)); } // enforce 110 fov, so things dont look odd
1836  else { setproperty(VF_FOV, GetCurrentFov(fov)); }
1837 
1838  if(camera_active) // Camera for demo playback
1839  {
1840  if(autocvar_camera_enable)
1841  CSQC_Demo_Camera();
1842  else
1843  {
1844  cvar_set("chase_active", ftos(chase_active_backup));
1845  cvar_set("cl_demo_mousegrab", "0");
1846  camera_active = false;
1847  }
1848  }
1849  else
1850  {
1851 #ifdef CAMERATEST
1852  if(autocvar_camera_enable)
1853 #else
1854  if(autocvar_camera_enable && isdemo())
1855 #endif
1856  {
1857  // Enable required Darkplaces cvars
1858  chase_active_backup = autocvar_chase_active;
1859  cvar_set("chase_active", "2");
1860  cvar_set("cl_demo_mousegrab", "1");
1861  camera_active = true;
1862  camera_mode = false;
1863  }
1864  }
1865 
1866  // Draw the Crosshair
1867  setproperty(VF_DRAWCROSSHAIR, 0); //Make sure engine crosshairs are always hidden
1868 
1869  // Draw the Engine Status Bar (the default Quake HUD)
1870  setproperty(VF_DRAWENGINESBAR, 0);
1871 
1872  // Update the mouse position
1873  /*
1874  mousepos_x = vid_conwidth;
1875  mousepos_y = vid_conheight;
1876  mousepos = mousepos*0.5 + getmousepos();
1877  */
1878 
1879  IL_EACH(g_drawables, it.draw, it.draw(it));
1880 
1881  addentities(MASK_NORMAL | MASK_ENGINE | MASK_ENGINEVIEWMODELS);
1882  renderscene();
1883 
1884  // now switch to 2D drawing mode by calling a 2D drawing function
1885  // then polygon drawing will draw as 2D stuff, and NOT get queued until the
1886  // next R_RenderScene call
1887  drawstring('0 0 0', "", '1 1 0', '1 1 1', 0, 0);
1888 
1889  if(autocvar_r_fakelight >= 2 || autocvar_r_fullbright)
1890  if (!(serverflags & SERVERFLAG_ALLOW_FULLBRIGHT))
1891  {
1892  // apply night vision effect
1893  vector tc_00, tc_01, tc_10, tc_11;
1894  vector rgb = '0 0 0';
1895 
1896  if(!nightvision_noise)
1897  {
1898  nightvision_noise = new(nightvision_noise);
1899  }
1900  if(!nightvision_noise2)
1901  {
1902  nightvision_noise2 = new(nightvision_noise2);
1903  }
1904 
1905  // color tint in yellow
1906  drawfill('0 0 0', autocvar_vid_conwidth * '1 0 0' + autocvar_vid_conheight * '0 1 0', '0.5 1 0.3', 1, DRAWFLAG_MODULATE);
1907 
1908  // draw BG
1909  a = Noise_Pink(nightvision_noise, frametime * 1.5) * 0.05 + 0.15;
1910  rgb = '1 1 1';
1911  tc_00 = '0 0 0' + '0.2 0 0' * sin(time * 0.3) + '0 0.3 0' * cos(time * 0.7);
1912  tc_01 = '0 2.25 0' + '0.6 0 0' * cos(time * 1.2) - '0 0.3 0' * sin(time * 2.2);
1913  tc_10 = '1.5 0 0' - '0.2 0 0' * sin(time * 0.5) + '0 0.5 0' * cos(time * 1.7);
1914  //tc_11 = '1 1 0' + '0.6 0 0' * sin(time * 0.6) + '0 0.3 0' * cos(time * 0.1);
1915  tc_11 = tc_01 + tc_10 - tc_00;
1916  R_BeginPolygon("gfx/nightvision-bg.tga", DRAWFLAG_ADDITIVE);
1917  R_PolygonVertex('0 0 0', tc_00, rgb, a);
1918  R_PolygonVertex(autocvar_vid_conwidth * '1 0 0', tc_10, rgb, a);
1919  R_PolygonVertex(autocvar_vid_conwidth * '1 0 0' + autocvar_vid_conheight * '0 1 0', tc_11, rgb, a);
1920  R_PolygonVertex(autocvar_vid_conheight * '0 1 0', tc_01, rgb, a);
1921  R_EndPolygon();
1922 
1923  // draw FG
1924  a = Noise_Pink(nightvision_noise2, frametime * 0.1) * 0.05 + 0.12;
1925  rgb = '0.3 0.6 0.4' + '0.1 0.4 0.2' * Noise_White(nightvision_noise2, frametime);
1926  tc_00 = '0 0 0' + '1 0 0' * Noise_White(nightvision_noise2, frametime) + '0 1 0' * Noise_White(nightvision_noise2, frametime);
1927  tc_01 = tc_00 + '0 3 0' * (1 + Noise_White(nightvision_noise2, frametime) * 0.2);
1928  tc_10 = tc_00 + '2 0 0' * (1 + Noise_White(nightvision_noise2, frametime) * 0.3);
1929  tc_11 = tc_01 + tc_10 - tc_00;
1930  R_BeginPolygon("gfx/nightvision-fg.tga", DRAWFLAG_ADDITIVE);
1931  R_PolygonVertex('0 0 0', tc_00, rgb, a);
1932  R_PolygonVertex(autocvar_vid_conwidth * '1 0 0', tc_10, rgb, a);
1933  R_PolygonVertex(autocvar_vid_conwidth * '1 0 0' + autocvar_vid_conheight * '0 1 0', tc_11, rgb, a);
1934  R_PolygonVertex(autocvar_vid_conheight * '0 1 0', tc_01, rgb, a);
1935  R_EndPolygon();
1936  }
1937 
1938  if(autocvar_cl_reticle)
1939  {
1940  Weapon wep = activeweapon;
1941  // Draw the aiming reticle for weapons that use it
1942  // reticle_type is changed to the item we are zooming / aiming with, to decide which reticle to use
1943  // It must be a persisted float for fading out to work properly (you let go of the zoom button for
1944  // the view to go back to normal, so reticle_type would become 0 as we fade out)
1945  if(spectatee_status || is_dead || hud != HUD_NORMAL)
1946  {
1947  // no zoom reticle while dead
1948  reticle_type = 0;
1949  }
1950  else if(wep.wr_zoomreticle(wep) && autocvar_cl_reticle_weapon)
1951  {
1952  if(reticle_image != "") { reticle_type = 2; }
1953  else { reticle_type = 0; }
1954  }
1955  else if(button_zoom || zoomscript_caught)
1956  {
1957  // normal zoom
1958  reticle_type = 1;
1959  }
1960 
1961  if(reticle_type)
1962  {
1963  if(autocvar_cl_reticle_stretch)
1964  {
1965  reticle_size.x = vid_conwidth;
1966  reticle_size.y = vid_conheight;
1967  reticle_pos.x = 0;
1968  reticle_pos.y = 0;
1969  }
1970  else
1971  {
1972  reticle_size.x = max(vid_conwidth, vid_conheight);
1973  reticle_size.y = max(vid_conwidth, vid_conheight);
1974  reticle_pos.x = (vid_conwidth - reticle_size.x) / 2;
1975  reticle_pos.y = (vid_conheight - reticle_size.y) / 2;
1976  }
1977 
1978  if(zoomscript_caught)
1979  f = 1;
1980  else
1981  f = current_zoomfraction;
1982 
1983  if(f)
1984  {
1985  switch(reticle_type)
1986  {
1987  case 1: drawpic(reticle_pos, "gfx/reticle_normal", reticle_size, '1 1 1', f * autocvar_cl_reticle_normal_alpha, DRAWFLAG_NORMAL); break;
1988  case 2: drawpic(reticle_pos, reticle_image, reticle_size, '1 1 1', f * autocvar_cl_reticle_weapon_alpha, DRAWFLAG_NORMAL); break;
1989  }
1990  }
1991  }
1992  }
1993  else
1994  {
1995  if(reticle_type != 0) { reticle_type = 0; }
1996  }
1997 
1998 
1999  // improved polyblend
2000  if(autocvar_hud_contents)
2001  {
2002  float contentalpha_temp, incontent, liquidalpha, contentfadetime;
2003  vector liquidcolor;
2004 
2005  switch(pointcontents(view_origin))
2006  {
2007  case CONTENT_WATER:
2008  liquidalpha = autocvar_hud_contents_water_alpha;
2009  liquidcolor = stov(autocvar_hud_contents_water_color);
2010  incontent = 1;
2011  break;
2012 
2013  case CONTENT_LAVA:
2014  liquidalpha = autocvar_hud_contents_lava_alpha;
2015  liquidcolor = stov(autocvar_hud_contents_lava_color);
2016  incontent = 1;
2017  break;
2018 
2019  case CONTENT_SLIME:
2020  liquidalpha = autocvar_hud_contents_slime_alpha;
2021  liquidcolor = stov(autocvar_hud_contents_slime_color);
2022  incontent = 1;
2023  break;
2024 
2025  default:
2026  liquidalpha = 0;
2027  liquidcolor = '0 0 0';
2028  incontent = 0;
2029  break;
2030  }
2031 
2032  if(incontent) // fade in/out at different speeds so you can do e.g. instant fade when entering water and slow when leaving it.
2033  { // also lets delcare previous values for blending properties, this way it isn't reset until after you have entered a different content
2034  contentfadetime = autocvar_hud_contents_fadeintime;
2035  liquidalpha_prev = liquidalpha;
2036  liquidcolor_prev = liquidcolor;
2037  }
2038  else
2039  contentfadetime = autocvar_hud_contents_fadeouttime;
2040 
2041  contentalpha_temp = bound(0, drawframetime / max(0.0001, contentfadetime), 1);
2042  contentavgalpha = contentavgalpha * (1 - contentalpha_temp) + incontent * contentalpha_temp;
2043 
2044  if(contentavgalpha)
2045  drawfill('0 0 0', eX * vid_conwidth + eY * vid_conheight, liquidcolor_prev, contentavgalpha * liquidalpha_prev, DRAWFLAG_NORMAL);
2046 
2047  if(autocvar_hud_postprocessing)
2048  {
2049  if(autocvar_hud_contents_blur && contentavgalpha)
2050  {
2051  content_blurpostprocess.x = 1;
2052  content_blurpostprocess.y = contentavgalpha * autocvar_hud_contents_blur;
2053  content_blurpostprocess.z = contentavgalpha * autocvar_hud_contents_blur_alpha;
2054  }
2055  else
2056  {
2057  content_blurpostprocess.x = 0;
2058  content_blurpostprocess.y = 0;
2059  content_blurpostprocess.z = 0;
2060  }
2061  }
2062  }
2063 
2064  if(autocvar_hud_damage && !STAT(FROZEN))
2065  {
2066  splash_size.x = max(vid_conwidth, vid_conheight);
2067  splash_size.y = max(vid_conwidth, vid_conheight);
2068  splash_pos.x = (vid_conwidth - splash_size.x) / 2;
2069  splash_pos.y = (vid_conheight - splash_size.y) / 2;
2070 
2071  float myhealth_flash_temp;
2072  myhealth = STAT(HEALTH);
2073 
2074  // fade out
2075  myhealth_flash = max(0, myhealth_flash - autocvar_hud_damage_fade_rate * frametime);
2076  // add new damage
2077  myhealth_flash = bound(0, myhealth_flash + dmg_take * autocvar_hud_damage_factor, autocvar_hud_damage_maxalpha);
2078 
2079  float pain_threshold, pain_threshold_lower, pain_threshold_lower_health;
2080  pain_threshold = autocvar_hud_damage_pain_threshold;
2081  pain_threshold_lower = autocvar_hud_damage_pain_threshold_lower;
2082  pain_threshold_lower_health = autocvar_hud_damage_pain_threshold_lower_health;
2083 
2084  if(pain_threshold_lower && myhealth < pain_threshold_lower_health)
2085  {
2086  pain_threshold = pain_threshold - max(autocvar_hud_damage_pain_threshold_pulsating_min, fabs(sin(M_PI * time / autocvar_hud_damage_pain_threshold_pulsating_period))) * pain_threshold_lower * (1 - max(0, myhealth)/pain_threshold_lower_health);
2087  }
2088 
2089  myhealth_flash_temp = bound(0, myhealth_flash - pain_threshold, 1);
2090 
2091  if(myhealth_prev < 1)
2092  {
2093  if(myhealth >= 1)
2094  {
2095  myhealth_flash = 0; // just spawned, clear the flash immediately
2096  myhealth_flash_temp = 0;
2097  }
2098  else
2099  {
2100  myhealth_flash += autocvar_hud_damage_fade_rate * frametime; // dead
2101  }
2102  }
2103 
2104  if(spectatee_status == -1 || intermission)
2105  {
2106  myhealth_flash = 0; // observing, or match ended
2107  myhealth_flash_temp = 0;
2108  }
2109 
2110  myhealth_prev = myhealth;
2111 
2112  // IDEA: change damage color/picture based on player model for robot/alien species?
2113  // pro: matches model better
2114  // contra: it's not red because blood is red, but because red is an alarming color, so red should stay
2115  // maybe different reddish pics?
2116  if(autocvar_cl_gentle_damage || autocvar_cl_gentle)
2117  {
2118  if(autocvar_cl_gentle_damage == 2)
2119  {
2120  if(myhealth_flash < pain_threshold) // only randomize when the flash is gone
2121  myhealth_gentlergb = eX * random() + eY * random() + eZ * random();
2122  }
2123  else
2124  myhealth_gentlergb = stov(autocvar_hud_damage_gentle_color);
2125 
2126  if(myhealth_flash_temp > 0)
2127  drawfill('0 0 0', eX * vid_conwidth + eY * vid_conheight, myhealth_gentlergb, autocvar_hud_damage_gentle_alpha_multiplier * bound(0, myhealth_flash_temp, 1) * autocvar_hud_damage, DRAWFLAG_NORMAL);
2128  }
2129  else if(myhealth_flash_temp > 0)
2130  drawpic(splash_pos, "gfx/blood", splash_size, stov(autocvar_hud_damage_color), bound(0, myhealth_flash_temp, 1) * autocvar_hud_damage, DRAWFLAG_NORMAL);
2131 
2132  if(autocvar_hud_postprocessing) // we still need to set this anyway even when chase_active is set, this way it doesn't get stuck on.
2133  {
2134  if(autocvar_hud_damage_blur && myhealth_flash_temp)
2135  {
2136  damage_blurpostprocess.x = 1;
2137  damage_blurpostprocess.y = bound(0, myhealth_flash_temp, 1) * autocvar_hud_damage_blur;
2138  damage_blurpostprocess.z = bound(0, myhealth_flash_temp, 1) * autocvar_hud_damage_blur_alpha;
2139  }
2140  else
2141  {
2142  damage_blurpostprocess.x = 0;
2143  damage_blurpostprocess.y = 0;
2144  damage_blurpostprocess.z = 0;
2145  }
2146  }
2147  }
2148 
2149  float e1 = (autocvar_hud_postprocessing_maxbluralpha != 0);
2150  float e2 = (autocvar_hud_powerup != 0);
2151  if(autocvar_hud_postprocessing && (e1 || e2)) // TODO: Remove this code and re-do the postprocess handling in the engine, where it properly belongs.
2152  {
2153  // enable or disable rendering types if they are used or not
2154  if(cvar("r_glsl_postprocess_uservec1_enable") != e1) { cvar_set("r_glsl_postprocess_uservec1_enable", ftos(e1)); }
2155  if(cvar("r_glsl_postprocess_uservec2_enable") != e2) { cvar_set("r_glsl_postprocess_uservec2_enable", ftos(e2)); }
2156 
2157  // blur postprocess handling done first (used by hud_damage and hud_contents)
2158  if((damage_blurpostprocess.x || content_blurpostprocess.x))
2159  {
2160  float blurradius = bound(0, damage_blurpostprocess.y + content_blurpostprocess.y, autocvar_hud_postprocessing_maxblurradius);
2161  float bluralpha = bound(0, damage_blurpostprocess.z + content_blurpostprocess.z, autocvar_hud_postprocessing_maxbluralpha);
2162  if(blurradius != old_blurradius || bluralpha != old_bluralpha) // reduce cvar_set spam as much as possible
2163  {
2164  cvar_set("r_glsl_postprocess_uservec1", strcat(ftos(blurradius), " ", ftos(bluralpha), " 0 0"));
2165  old_blurradius = blurradius;
2166  old_bluralpha = bluralpha;
2167  }
2168  }
2169  else if(cvar_string("r_glsl_postprocess_uservec1") != "0 0 0 0") // reduce cvar_set spam as much as possible
2170  {
2171  cvar_set("r_glsl_postprocess_uservec1", "0 0 0 0");
2172  old_blurradius = 0;
2173  old_bluralpha = 0;
2174  }
2175 
2176  // edge detection postprocess handling done second (used by hud_powerup)
2177  float sharpen_intensity = 0, strength_finished = STAT(STRENGTH_FINISHED), invincible_finished = STAT(INVINCIBLE_FINISHED);
2178  if (strength_finished - time > 0) { sharpen_intensity += (strength_finished - time); }
2179  if (invincible_finished - time > 0) { sharpen_intensity += (invincible_finished - time); }
2180 
2181  sharpen_intensity = bound(0, ((STAT(HEALTH) > 0) ? sharpen_intensity : 0), 5); // Check to see if player is alive (if not, set 0) - also bound to fade out starting at 5 seconds.
2182 
2183  if(autocvar_hud_powerup && sharpen_intensity > 0)
2184  {
2185  if(sharpen_intensity != old_sharpen_intensity) // reduce cvar_set spam as much as possible
2186  {
2187  cvar_set("r_glsl_postprocess_uservec2", strcat(ftos((sharpen_intensity / 5) * autocvar_hud_powerup), " ", ftos(-sharpen_intensity * autocvar_hud_powerup), " 0 0"));
2188  old_sharpen_intensity = sharpen_intensity;
2189  }
2190  }
2191  else if(cvar_string("r_glsl_postprocess_uservec2") != "0 0 0 0") // reduce cvar_set spam as much as possible
2192  {
2193  cvar_set("r_glsl_postprocess_uservec2", "0 0 0 0");
2194  old_sharpen_intensity = 0;
2195  }
2196 
2197  if(cvar("r_glsl_postprocess") == 0)
2198  cvar_set("r_glsl_postprocess", "2");
2199  }
2200  else if(cvar("r_glsl_postprocess") == 2)
2201  cvar_set("r_glsl_postprocess", "0");
2202 
2203  /*if(gametype == MAPINFO_TYPE_CTF)
2204  {
2205  ctf_view();
2206  } else */
2207 
2208  // draw 2D entities
2209  IL_EACH(g_drawables_2d, it.draw2d, it.draw2d(it));
2210  Draw_ShowNames_All();
2211  Debug_Draw();
2212 
2213  scoreboard_active = Scoreboard_WouldDraw();
2214 
2215  HUD_Draw(this); // this parameter for deep vehicle function
2216 
2217  if(NextFrameCommand)
2218  {
2219  localcmd("\n", NextFrameCommand, "\n");
2220  NextFrameCommand = string_null;
2221  }
2222 
2223  // we must do this check AFTER a frame was rendered, or it won't work
2224  if(cs_project_is_b0rked == 0)
2225  {
2226  string w0, h0;
2227  w0 = ftos(autocvar_vid_conwidth);
2228  h0 = ftos(autocvar_vid_conheight);
2229  //setproperty(VF_VIEWPORT, '0 0 0', '640 480 0');
2230  //setproperty(VF_FOV, '90 90 0');
2231  setproperty(VF_ORIGIN, '0 0 0');
2232  setproperty(VF_ANGLES, '0 0 0');
2233  setproperty(VF_PERSPECTIVE, 1);
2234  makevectors('0 0 0');
2235  vector v1, v2;
2236  cvar_set("vid_conwidth", "800");
2237  cvar_set("vid_conheight", "600");
2238  v1 = cs_project(v_forward);
2239  cvar_set("vid_conwidth", "640");
2240  cvar_set("vid_conheight", "480");
2241  v2 = cs_project(v_forward);
2242  if(v1 == v2)
2243  cs_project_is_b0rked = 1;
2244  else
2245  cs_project_is_b0rked = -1;
2246  cvar_set("vid_conwidth", w0);
2247  cvar_set("vid_conheight", h0);
2248  }
2249 
2250  if(autocvar__hud_configure)
2251  HUD_Panel_Mouse();
2252  else if (HUD_MinigameMenu_IsOpened() || active_minigame)
2253  HUD_Minigame_Mouse();
2254  else if(QuickMenu_IsOpened())
2255  QuickMenu_Mouse();
2256  else
2257  HUD_Radar_Mouse();
2258 
2259  cl_notice_run();
2260  unpause_update();
2261  Net_Flush();
2262 
2263  // let's reset the view back to normal for the end
2264  setproperty(VF_MIN, '0 0 0');
2265  setproperty(VF_SIZE, '1 0 0' * w + '0 1 0' * h);
2266 
2267  IL_ENDFRAME();
2268 }

465  }
466 
467  if(zoomdir) { zoomin_effect = 0; }
468 
469  if(camera_active)
470  {
471  current_viewzoom = min(1, current_viewzoom + drawframetime);
472  }
473  else if(autocvar_cl_spawnzoom && zoomin_effect)
474  {
475  float spawnzoomfactor = bound(1, autocvar_cl_spawnzoom_factor, 30);
476 
477  current_viewzoom += (autocvar_cl_spawnzoom_speed * (spawnzoomfactor - current_viewzoom) * drawframetime);
478  current_viewzoom = bound(1 / spawnzoomfactor, current_viewzoom, 1);
479  if(current_viewzoom == 1) { zoomin_effect = 0; }
480  }
481  else
482  {
483  if(zoomspeed < 0) // instant zoom
484  {
485  if(zoomdir)
486  current_viewzoom = 1 / zoomfactor;
487  else
488  current_viewzoom = 1;
489  }
490  else
491  {
492  if(zoomdir)
493  current_viewzoom = 1 / bound(1, 1 / current_viewzoom + drawframetime * zoomspeed * (zoomfactor - 1), zoomfactor);
494  else
495  current_viewzoom = bound(1 / zoomfactor, current_viewzoom + drawframetime * zoomspeed * (1 - 1 / zoomfactor), 1);
496  }
497  }
498 
499  if(almost_equals(current_viewzoom, 1))
500  current_zoomfraction = 0;
501  else if(almost_equals(current_viewzoom, 1/zoomfactor))
502  current_zoomfraction = 1;
503  else
504  current_zoomfraction = (current_viewzoom - 1) / (1/zoomfactor - 1);
505 
506  if(zoomsensitivity < 1)
507  setsensitivityscale(pow(current_viewzoom, 1 - zoomsensitivity));
508  else
509  setsensitivityscale(1);
510

512  {
513  if(intermission) { curspeed = 0; }

515  {
516 
517  makevectors(view_angles);

519  if(csqcplayer)
520  v = csqcplayer.velocity;
521 
522  switch(autocvar_cl_velocityzoom_type)

524  case 3: curspeed = max(0, v_forward * v); break;
525  case 2: curspeed = (v_forward * v); break;
526  case 1: default: curspeed = vlen(v); break;
527  }
528  }
529 
530  velocityzoom = bound(0, drawframetime / max(0.000000001, autocvar_cl_velocityzoom_time), 1); // speed at which the zoom adapts to player velocity

532  velocityzoom = exp(float2range11(avgspeed * -autocvar_cl_velocityzoom_factor / 1) * 1);

void HitSound ( )

Definition at line 805 of file view.qc.

Referenced by HUD_Draw().

806 {
807  // varying sound pitch
808 
809  static float hitsound_time_prev = 0;
810  // HACK: the only way to get the arc to sound consistent with pitch shift is to ignore cl_hitsound_antispam_time
811  float arc_hack = activeweapon == WEP_ARC && autocvar_cl_hitsound >= 2;
812  if (arc_hack || COMPARE_INCREASING(time, hitsound_time_prev) > autocvar_cl_hitsound_antispam_time)
813  {
814  if (autocvar_cl_hitsound && unaccounted_damage)
815  {
816  // customizable gradient function that crosses (0,a), (c,1) and asymptotically approaches b
817  float a = autocvar_cl_hitsound_max_pitch;
818  float b = autocvar_cl_hitsound_min_pitch;
819  float c = autocvar_cl_hitsound_nom_damage;
820  float x = unaccounted_damage;
821  float pitch_shift = (b*x*(a-1) + a*c*(1-b)) / (x*(a-1) + c*(1-b));
822 
823  // if sound variation is disabled, set pitch_shift to 1
824  if (autocvar_cl_hitsound == 1)
825  pitch_shift = 1;
826 
827  // if pitch shift is reversed, mirror in (max-min)/2 + min
828  if (autocvar_cl_hitsound == 3)
829  {
830  float mirror_value = (a-b)/2 + b;
831  pitch_shift = mirror_value + (mirror_value - pitch_shift);
832  }
833 
834  LOG_TRACE("dmg total (dmg): ", ftos(unaccounted_damage), " , pitch shift: ", ftos(pitch_shift));
835 
836  // todo: avoid very long and very short sounds from wave stretching using different sound files? seems unnecessary
837  // todo: normalize sound pressure levels? seems unnecessary
838 
839  sound7(NULL, CH_INFO, SND(HIT), VOL_BASE, ATTN_NONE, pitch_shift * 100, 0);
840  }
841  unaccounted_damage = 0;
842  hitsound_time_prev = time;
843  }
844 
845  static float typehit_time_prev = 0;
846  float typehit_time = STAT(TYPEHIT_TIME);
847  if (COMPARE_INCREASING(typehit_time, typehit_time_prev) > autocvar_cl_hitsound_antispam_time)
848  {
849  sound(NULL, CH_INFO, SND_TYPEHIT, VOL_BASE, ATTN_NONE);
850  typehit_time_prev = typehit_time;
851  }
852 }

943  return;

946  return;

955  float wcross_alpha, wcross_resolution;

958  return;
959  wcross_resolution = autocvar_crosshair_size;
960  if (wcross_resolution == 0)
961  return;
962  wcross_alpha = autocvar_crosshair_alpha;
963  if (wcross_alpha == 0)
964  return;

966  // TrueAim check
967  float shottype;

970  wcross_origin = project_3d_to_2d(view_origin + MAX_SHOT_DISTANCE * view_forward);
971  wcross_origin.z = 0;
972  if(autocvar_crosshair_hittest)
973  {
974  vector wcross_oldorigin;
975  wcross_oldorigin = wcross_origin;
976  shottype = TrueAimCheck();
977  if(shottype == SHOTTYPE_HITWORLD)
978  {
979  v = wcross_origin - wcross_oldorigin;
980  v.x /= vid_conwidth;
981  v.y /= vid_conheight;
982  if(vdist(v, >, 0.01))
983  shottype = SHOTTYPE_HITOBSTRUCTION;
984  }
985  if(!autocvar_crosshair_hittest_showimpact)
986  wcross_origin = wcross_oldorigin;
987  }
988  else
989  shottype = SHOTTYPE_HITWORLD;
990 
991  vector wcross_color = '0 0 0', wcross_size = '0 0 0';
992  string wcross_name = "";
993  float wcross_scale, wcross_blur;
994 
995  entity e = WEP_Null;
996  if(autocvar_crosshair_per_weapon || (autocvar_crosshair_color_special == 1))
997  {
998  e = switchingweapon;
999  if(e)
1000  {
1001  if(autocvar_crosshair_per_weapon)
1002  {
1003  // WEAPONTODO: access these through some general settings (with non-balance config settings)
1004  //wcross_resolution *= cvar(strcat("crosshair_", wcross_wep, "_size"));
1005  //if (wcross_resolution == 0)
1006  //return;
1007 
1008  //wcross_style = cvar_string(strcat("crosshair_", wcross_wep));
1009  wcross_resolution *= e.w_crosshair_size;
1010  wcross_name = e.w_crosshair;
1011  }
1012  }
1013  }
1014 
1015  if(wcross_name == "")
1016  wcross_name = strcat("gfx/crosshair", wcross_style);
1017 
1018  // MAIN CROSSHAIR COLOR DECISION
1019  wcross_color = crosshair_getcolor(e, STAT(HEALTH));
1020 
1021  if(autocvar_crosshair_effect_scalefade)
1022  {
1023  wcross_scale = wcross_resolution;
1024  wcross_resolution = 1;
1025  }
1026  else
1027  {
1028  wcross_scale = 1;
1029  }
1030 
1031  if(autocvar_crosshair_pickup)
1032  {
1033  float stat_pickup_time = STAT(LAST_PICKUP);
1034 
1035  if(pickup_crosshair_time < stat_pickup_time)
1036  {
1037  if(time - stat_pickup_time < MAX_TIME_DIFF) // don't trigger the animation if it's too old
1038  pickup_crosshair_size = 1;
1039 
1040  pickup_crosshair_time = stat_pickup_time;
1041  }
1042 
1043  if(pickup_crosshair_size > 0)
1044  pickup_crosshair_size -= autocvar_crosshair_pickup_speed * frametime;
1045  else
1046  pickup_crosshair_size = 0;
1047 
1048  wcross_scale += sin(pickup_crosshair_size) * autocvar_crosshair_pickup;
1049  }
1050 
1051  // todo: make crosshair hit indication dependent on damage dealt
1052  if(autocvar_crosshair_hitindication)
1053  {
1054  vector hitindication_color = ((autocvar_crosshair_color_special == 1) ? stov(autocvar_crosshair_hitindication_per_weapon_color) : stov(autocvar_crosshair_hitindication_color));
1055 
1056  if(unaccounted_damage)
1057  {
1058  hitindication_crosshair_size = 1;
1059  }
1060 
1061  if(hitindication_crosshair_size > 0)
1062  hitindication_crosshair_size -= autocvar_crosshair_hitindication_speed * frametime;
1063  else
1064  hitindication_crosshair_size = 0;
1065 
1066  wcross_scale += sin(hitindication_crosshair_size) * autocvar_crosshair_hitindication;
1067  wcross_color.x += sin(hitindication_crosshair_size) * hitindication_color.x;
1068  wcross_color.y += sin(hitindication_crosshair_size) * hitindication_color.y;
1069  wcross_color.z += sin(hitindication_crosshair_size) * hitindication_color.z;
1070  }
1071 
1072  if(shottype == SHOTTYPE_HITENEMY)
1073  wcross_scale *= autocvar_crosshair_hittest; // is not queried if hittest is 0
1074  if(shottype == SHOTTYPE_HITTEAM)
1075  wcross_scale /= autocvar_crosshair_hittest; // is not queried if hittest is 0
1076 
1077  f = fabs(autocvar_crosshair_effect_time);
1078  if(wcross_scale != wcross_scale_goal_prev || wcross_alpha != wcross_alpha_goal_prev || wcross_color != wcross_color_goal_prev)
1079  {
1080  wcross_changedonetime = time + f;
1081  }
1082  if(wcross_name != wcross_name_goal_prev || wcross_resolution != wcross_resolution_goal_prev)
1083  {
1084  wcross_name_changestarttime = time;
1085  wcross_name_changedonetime = time + f;
1086  if(wcross_name_goal_prev_prev)
1087  strunzone(wcross_name_goal_prev_prev);
1088  wcross_name_goal_prev_prev = wcross_name_goal_prev;
1089  wcross_name_goal_prev = strzone(wcross_name);
1090  wcross_name_alpha_goal_prev_prev = wcross_name_alpha_goal_prev;

1092  wcross_resolution_goal_prev = wcross_resolution;
1093  }
1094 
1095  wcross_scale_goal_prev = wcross_scale;
1096  wcross_alpha_goal_prev = wcross_alpha;
1097  wcross_color_goal_prev = wcross_color;
1098 
1099  if(spectatee_status == -1 && shottype == SHOTTYPE_HITTEAM || (shottype == SHOTTYPE_HITOBSTRUCTION && autocvar_crosshair_hittest_blur && !autocvar_chase_active))
1100  {
1101  wcross_blur = 1;
1102  wcross_alpha *= 0.75;
1103  }
1104  else
1105  wcross_blur = 0;
1106  // *_prev is at time-frametime
1107  // * is at wcross_changedonetime+f
1108  // what do we have at time?
1109  if(time < wcross_changedonetime)
1110  {
1111  f = frametime / (wcross_changedonetime - time + frametime);
1112  wcross_scale = f * wcross_scale + (1 - f) * wcross_scale_prev;
1113  wcross_alpha = f * wcross_alpha + (1 - f) * wcross_alpha_prev;
1114  wcross_color = f * wcross_color + (1 - f) * wcross_color_prev;
1115  }
1116 
1117  wcross_scale_prev = wcross_scale;
1118  wcross_alpha_prev = wcross_alpha;
1119  wcross_color_prev = wcross_color;
1120 
1121  MUTATOR_CALLHOOK(UpdateCrosshair);
1122 
1123  wcross_scale *= 1 - autocvar__menu_alpha;
1124  wcross_alpha *= 1 - autocvar__menu_alpha;
1125  wcross_size = draw_getimagesize(wcross_name) * wcross_scale;
1126 
1127  if(wcross_scale >= 0.001 && wcross_alpha >= 0.001)
1128  {
1129  // crosshair rings for weapon stats
1130  if (autocvar_crosshair_ring || autocvar_crosshair_ring_reload)
1131  {
1132  // declarations and stats
1133  float ring_value = 0, ring_scale = 0, ring_alpha = 0, ring_inner_value = 0, ring_inner_alpha = 0;
1134  string ring_image = string_null, ring_inner_image = string_null;
1135  vector ring_rgb = '0 0 0', ring_inner_rgb = '0 0 0';
1136 
1137  ring_scale = autocvar_crosshair_ring_size;
1138 
1139  float weapon_clipload, weapon_clipsize;
1140  weapon_clipload = STAT(WEAPON_CLIPLOAD);
1141  weapon_clipsize = STAT(WEAPON_CLIPSIZE);
1142 
1143  float ok_ammo_charge, ok_ammo_chargepool;
1144  ok_ammo_charge = STAT(OK_AMMO_CHARGE);
1145  ok_ammo_chargepool = STAT(OK_AMMO_CHARGEPOOL);
1146 
1147  float vortex_charge, vortex_chargepool;
1148  vortex_charge = STAT(VORTEX_CHARGE);
1149  vortex_chargepool = STAT(VORTEX_CHARGEPOOL);
1150 
1151  float arc_heat = STAT(ARC_HEAT);
1152 
1153  if(vortex_charge_movingavg == 0) // this should only happen if we have just loaded up the game
1154  vortex_charge_movingavg = vortex_charge;
1155 
1156 
1157  // handle the values
1158  if (autocvar_crosshair_ring && activeweapon == WEP_VORTEX && vortex_charge && autocvar_crosshair_ring_vortex) // ring around crosshair representing velocity-dependent damage for the vortex
1159  {
1160  if (vortex_chargepool || use_vortex_chargepool) {
1161  use_vortex_chargepool = 1;
1162  ring_inner_value = vortex_chargepool;
1163  } else {
1164  vortex_charge_movingavg = (1 - autocvar_crosshair_ring_vortex_currentcharge_movingavg_rate) * vortex_charge_movingavg + autocvar_crosshair_ring_vortex_currentcharge_movingavg_rate * vortex_charge;
1165  ring_inner_value = bound(0, autocvar_crosshair_ring_vortex_currentcharge_scale * (vortex_charge - vortex_charge_movingavg), 1);
1166  }
1167 
1168  ring_inner_alpha = autocvar_crosshair_ring_vortex_inner_alpha;
1169  ring_inner_rgb = eX * autocvar_crosshair_ring_vortex_inner_color_red + eY * autocvar_crosshair_ring_vortex_inner_color_green + eZ * autocvar_crosshair_ring_vortex_inner_color_blue;
1170  ring_inner_image = "gfx/crosshair_ring_inner.tga";
1171 
1172  // draw the outer ring to show the current charge of the weapon
1173  ring_value = vortex_charge;
1174  ring_alpha = autocvar_crosshair_ring_vortex_alpha;
1175  ring_rgb = wcross_color;
1176  ring_image = "gfx/crosshair_ring_nexgun.tga";
1177  }
1178  else if (autocvar_crosshair_ring && activeweapon == WEP_MINE_LAYER && WEP_CVAR(minelayer, limit) && autocvar_crosshair_ring_minelayer)
1179  {
1180  ring_value = bound(0, STAT(LAYED_MINES) / WEP_CVAR(minelayer, limit), 1); // if you later need to use the count of bullets in another place, then add a float for it. For now, no need to.
1181  ring_alpha = autocvar_crosshair_ring_minelayer_alpha;
1182  ring_rgb = wcross_color;
1183  ring_image = "gfx/crosshair_ring.tga";
1184  }
1185  else if (activeweapon == WEP_HAGAR && STAT(HAGAR_LOAD) && autocvar_crosshair_ring_hagar)
1186  {
1187  ring_value = bound(0, STAT(HAGAR_LOAD) / WEP_CVAR_SEC(hagar, load_max), 1);
1188  ring_alpha = autocvar_crosshair_ring_hagar_alpha;
1189  ring_rgb = wcross_color;
1190  ring_image = "gfx/crosshair_ring.tga";
1191  }
1192  else if (ok_ammo_charge)
1193  {
1194  ring_value = ok_ammo_chargepool;
1195  ring_alpha = autocvar_crosshair_ring_reload_alpha;
1196  ring_rgb = wcross_color;
1197  ring_image = "gfx/crosshair_ring.tga";
1198  }
1199  else if(autocvar_crosshair_ring_reload && weapon_clipsize) // forces there to be only an ammo ring
1200  {
1201  ring_value = bound(0, weapon_clipload / weapon_clipsize, 1);
1202  ring_scale = autocvar_crosshair_ring_reload_size;
1203  ring_alpha = autocvar_crosshair_ring_reload_alpha;
1204  ring_rgb = wcross_color;
1205 
1206  // Note: This is to stop Taoki from complaining that the image doesn't match all potential balances.
1207  // if a new image for another weapon is added, add the code (and its respective file/value) here
1208  if ((activeweapon == WEP_RIFLE) && (weapon_clipsize == 80))
1209  ring_image = "gfx/crosshair_ring_rifle.tga";
1210  else
1211  ring_image = "gfx/crosshair_ring.tga";
1212  }
1213  else if ( autocvar_crosshair_ring && autocvar_crosshair_ring_arc && arc_heat && activeweapon == WEP_ARC )
1214  {
1215  ring_value = arc_heat;
1216  ring_alpha = (1-arc_heat)*autocvar_crosshair_ring_arc_cold_alpha +
1217  arc_heat*autocvar_crosshair_ring_arc_hot_alpha;
1218  ring_rgb = (1-arc_heat)*wcross_color + arc_heat*autocvar_crosshair_ring_arc_hot_color;
1219  ring_image = "gfx/crosshair_ring.tga";
1220  }
1221 
1222  // if in weapon switch animation, fade ring out/in
1223  if(autocvar_crosshair_effect_time > 0)
1224  {
1225  f = (time - wcross_name_changestarttime) / autocvar_crosshair_effect_time;
1226  if (f >= 1)
1227  {
1228  wcross_ring_prev = ((ring_image) ? true : false);
1229  }
1230 
1231  if(wcross_ring_prev)
1232  {
1233  if(f < 1)
1234  ring_alpha *= fabs(1 - bound(0, f, 1));
1235  }
1236  else
1237  {
1238  if(f < 1)
1239  ring_alpha *= bound(0, f, 1);
1240  }
1241  }
1242 
1243  if (autocvar_crosshair_ring_inner && ring_inner_value) // lets draw a ring inside a ring so you can ring while you ring
1244  DrawCircleClippedPic(wcross_origin, wcross_size.x * ring_scale, ring_inner_image, ring_inner_value, ring_inner_rgb, wcross_alpha * ring_inner_alpha, DRAWFLAG_ADDITIVE);
1245 
1246  if (ring_value)
1247  DrawCircleClippedPic(wcross_origin, wcross_size.x * ring_scale, ring_image, ring_value, ring_rgb, wcross_alpha * ring_alpha, DRAWFLAG_ADDITIVE);
1248  }
1249 
1250 #define CROSSHAIR_DO_BLUR(M,sz,wcross_name,wcross_alpha) \
1251  MACRO_BEGIN { \
1252  if(wcross_blur > 0) \
1253  { \
1254  for(i = -2; i <= 2; ++i) \
1255  for(j = -2; j <= 2; ++j) \
1256  M(i,j,sz,wcross_name,wcross_alpha*0.04); \
1257  } \
1258  else \
1259  { \
1260  M(0,0,sz,wcross_name,wcross_alpha); \
1261  } \
1262  } MACRO_END
1263 
1264 #define CROSSHAIR_DRAW_SINGLE(i,j,sz,wcross_name,wcross_alpha) \
1265  drawpic(wcross_origin - ('0.5 0 0' * (sz * wcross_size.x + i * wcross_blur) + '0 0.5 0' * (sz * wcross_size.y + j * wcross_blur)), wcross_name, sz * wcross_size, wcross_color, wcross_alpha, DRAWFLAG_NORMAL)
1266 
1267 #define CROSSHAIR_DRAW(sz,wcross_name,wcross_alpha) \
1268  CROSSHAIR_DO_BLUR(CROSSHAIR_DRAW_SINGLE,sz,wcross_name,wcross_alpha)
1269 
1270  if(time < wcross_name_changedonetime && wcross_name != wcross_name_goal_prev_prev && wcross_name_goal_prev_prev)
1271  {
1272  f = (wcross_name_changedonetime - time) / (wcross_name_changedonetime - wcross_name_changestarttime);
1273  wcross_size = draw_getimagesize(wcross_name_goal_prev_prev) * wcross_scale;
1274  CROSSHAIR_DRAW(wcross_resolution_goal_prev_prev, wcross_name_goal_prev_prev, wcross_alpha * f * wcross_name_alpha_goal_prev_prev);
1275  f = 1 - f;
1276  }
1277  else
1278  {
1279  f = 1;
1280  }
1281  wcross_name_alpha_goal_prev = f;
1282 
1283  wcross_size = draw_getimagesize(wcross_name) * wcross_scale;
1284  CROSSHAIR_DRAW(wcross_resolution, wcross_name, wcross_alpha * f);
1285 
1286  if(autocvar_crosshair_dot)
1287  {
1288  vector wcross_color_old;
1289  wcross_color_old = wcross_color;
1290 
1291  if((autocvar_crosshair_dot_color_custom) && (autocvar_crosshair_dot_color != "0"))
1292  wcross_color = stov(autocvar_crosshair_dot_color);
1293 
1294  CROSSHAIR_DRAW(wcross_resolution * autocvar_crosshair_dot_size, "gfx/crosshairdot.tga", f * autocvar_crosshair_dot_alpha);
1295  // FIXME why don't we use wcross_alpha here?
1296  wcross_color = wcross_color_old;
1297  }
1298  }
1299  }
1300  else
1301  {
1302  wcross_scale_prev = 0;
1303  wcross_alpha_prev = 0;
1304  wcross_scale_goal_prev = 0;
1305  wcross_alpha_goal_prev = 0;
1306  wcross_changedonetime = 0;
1307  if(wcross_name_goal_prev)
1308  strunzone(wcross_name_goal_prev);
1309  wcross_name_goal_prev = string_null;
1310  if(wcross_name_goal_prev_prev)
1311  strunzone(wcross_name_goal_prev_prev);
1312  wcross_name_goal_prev_prev = string_null;
1313  wcross_name_changestarttime = 0;
1314  wcross_name_changedonetime = 0;
1315  wcross_name_alpha_goal_prev = 0;
1316  wcross_name_alpha_goal_prev_prev = 0;
1317  wcross_resolution_goal_prev = 0;
1318  wcross_resolution_goal_prev_prev = 0;
1319  }
1320 }

Referenced by viewmodel_animate().

173 {
174  float frac;
175  vector gunangles = '0 0 0';
176  static vector gunangles_prev = '0 0 0';
177  static vector gunangles_highpass = '0 0 0';
178  static vector gunangles_adjustment_highpass;
179  static vector gunangles_adjustment_lowpass;
180 
181  if (view.csqcmodel_teleported)
182  gunangles_prev = view_angles;
183 
184  // in the highpass, we _store_ the DIFFERENCE to the actual view angles...
185  gunangles_highpass += gunangles_prev;
186  PITCH(gunangles_highpass) += 360 * floor((PITCH(view_angles) - PITCH(gunangles_highpass)) / 360 + 0.5);
187  YAW(gunangles_highpass) += 360 * floor((YAW(view_angles) - YAW(gunangles_highpass)) / 360 + 0.5);
188  ROLL(gunangles_highpass) += 360 * floor((ROLL(view_angles) - ROLL(gunangles_highpass)) / 360 + 0.5);
189  frac = avg_factor(autocvar_cl_leanmodel_highpass1);
190  highpass2_limited(view_angles, frac, autocvar_cl_leanmodel_limit, gunangles_highpass, gunangles);
191  gunangles_prev = view_angles;
192  gunangles_highpass -= gunangles_prev;
193 
194  PITCH(gunangles) *= -autocvar_cl_leanmodel_speed;
195  YAW(gunangles) *= -autocvar_cl_leanmodel_speed;
196 
197  // we assume here: PITCH = 0, YAW = 1, ROLL = 2
198  frac = avg_factor(autocvar_cl_leanmodel_highpass);
199  highpass2(gunangles, frac, gunangles_adjustment_highpass, gunangles);
200  frac = avg_factor(autocvar_cl_leanmodel_lowpass);
201  lowpass2(gunangles, frac, gunangles_adjustment_lowpass, gunangles);
202 
203  gunangles.x = -gunangles.x; // pitch was inverted, now that actually matters
204 
205  return gunangles;
206 }

void Porto_Draw ( entity  this)

Referenced by STATIC_INIT().

373 {
374  if (activeweapon != WEP_PORTO) return;
375  if (spectatee_status) return;
376  if (WEP_CVAR(porto, secondary)) return;
377  if (intermission == 1) return;
378  if (intermission == 2) return;
379  if (STAT(HEALTH) <= 0) return;
380 
381  vector pos = view_origin;
382  vector dir = view_forward;
383  if (angles_held_status)
384  {
385  makevectors(angles_held);
386  dir = v_forward;
387  }
388 
389  polyline[0] = pos;
390 
391  int portal_number = 0, portal1_idx = 1, portal_max = 2;
392  int n = 1 + 2; // 2 lines == 3 points
393  for (int idx = 0; idx < n && idx < polyline_length - 1; )
394  {
395  traceline(pos, pos + 65536 * dir, true, this);
396  dir = reflect(dir, trace_plane_normal);
397  pos = trace_endpos;
398  polyline[++idx] = pos;
399  if (trace_dphitq3surfaceflags & Q3SURFACEFLAG_SLICK || trace_dphitcontents & DPCONTENTS_PLAYERCLIP)
400  {
401  n += 1;
402  continue;
403  }
404  if (trace_dphitq3surfaceflags & Q3SURFACEFLAG_NOIMPACT)
405  {
406  n = max(2, idx);
407  break;
408  }
409  // check size
410  {
411  vector ang = vectoangles2(trace_plane_normal, dir);
412  ang.x = -ang.x;
413  makevectors(ang);
414  if (!CheckWireframeBox(this, pos - 48 * v_right - 48 * v_up + 16 * v_forward, 96 * v_right, 96 * v_up, 96 * v_forward))
415  {
416  n = max(2, idx);
417  break;
418  }
419  }
420  portal_number += 1;
421  if (portal_number >= portal_max) break;
422  if (portal_number == 1) portal1_idx = idx;
423  }
424  for (int idx = 0; idx < n - 1; ++idx)
425  {
426  vector p = polyline[idx], q = polyline[idx + 1];
427  if (idx == 0) p -= view_up * 16; // line from player
428  vector rgb = (idx < portal1_idx) ? '1 0 0' : '0 0 1';
429  Draw_CylindricLine(p, q, 4, "", 1, 0, rgb, 0.5, DRAWFLAG_NORMAL, view_origin);
430  }
431 }

float TrueAimCheck ( )

Definition at line 621 of file view.qc.

References activeweapon, decompressShotOrigin(), EnemyHitCheck(), entity(), eZ, g_trueaim_minrange, MAX_SHOT_DISTANCE, MOVE_NOMONSTERS, MOVE_NORMAL, player_localentnum, SHOTTYPE_HITOBSTRUCTION, SHOTTYPE_HITWORLD, trace_endpos, trueaim, trueaim_rifle, vdist, vector(), view_forward, view_origin, view_right, view_up, vlen(), w_shotorg, and zoomscript_caught.

Referenced by HUD_Crosshair().

622 {
623  float nudge = 1; // added to traceline target and subtracted from result TOOD(divVerent): do we still need this? Doesn't the engine do this now for us?
624  vector vecs, trueaimpoint, w_shotorg;
625  vector mi, ma, dv;
626  float shottype;
627  entity ta;
628  float mv;
629 
630  mi = ma = '0 0 0';
631  ta = trueaim;
632  mv = MOVE_NOMONSTERS;
633 
634  switch(activeweapon) // WEAPONTODO
635  {
636  case WEP_TUBA: // no aim
637  case WEP_PORTO: // shoots from eye
638  case WEP_NEXBALL: // shoots from eye
639  case WEP_HOOK: // no trueaim
640  case WEP_MORTAR: // toss curve
641  return SHOTTYPE_HITWORLD;
642  case WEP_VORTEX:
643  case WEP_VAPORIZER:
644  mv = MOVE_NORMAL;
645  break;
646  case WEP_RIFLE:
647  ta = trueaim_rifle;
648  mv = MOVE_NORMAL;
649  if(zoomscript_caught)
650  {
651  tracebox(view_origin, '0 0 0', '0 0 0', view_origin + view_forward * MAX_SHOT_DISTANCE, mv, ta);
652  return EnemyHitCheck();
653  }
654  break;
655  case WEP_DEVASTATOR: // projectile has a size!
656  mi = '-3 -3 -3';
657  ma = '3 3 3';
658  break;
659  case WEP_FIREBALL: // projectile has a size!
660  mi = '-16 -16 -16';
661  ma = '16 16 16';
662  break;
663  case WEP_SEEKER: // projectile has a size!
664  mi = '-2 -2 -2';
665  ma = '2 2 2';
666  break;
667  case WEP_ELECTRO: // projectile has a size!
668  mi = '0 0 -3';
669  ma = '0 0 -3';
670  break;
671  }
672 
673  vector traceorigin = entcs_receiver(player_localentnum - 1).origin + (eZ * STAT(VIEWHEIGHT));
674 
675  vecs = decompressShotOrigin(STAT(SHOTORG));
676 
677  traceline(traceorigin, traceorigin + view_forward * MAX_SHOT_DISTANCE, mv, ta);
678  trueaimpoint = trace_endpos;
679 
680  if(vdist((trueaimpoint - traceorigin), <, g_trueaim_minrange))
681  trueaimpoint = traceorigin + view_forward * g_trueaim_minrange;
682 
683  if(vecs.x > 0)
684  vecs.y = -vecs.y;
685  else
686  vecs = '0 0 0';
687 
688  dv = view_right * vecs.y + view_up * vecs.z;
689  w_shotorg = traceorigin + dv;
690 
691  // now move the vecs forward as much as requested if possible
692  tracebox(w_shotorg, mi, ma, w_shotorg + view_forward * (vecs.x + nudge), MOVE_NORMAL, ta); // FIXME this MOVE_NORMAL part will misbehave a little in csqc
693  w_shotorg = trace_endpos - view_forward * nudge;
694 
695  tracebox(w_shotorg, mi, ma, trueaimpoint, MOVE_NORMAL, ta);
696  shottype = EnemyHitCheck();
697  if(shottype != SHOTTYPE_HITWORLD)
698  return shottype;
699 
700 #if 0
701  // FIXME WHY DOES THIS NOT WORK FOR THE ROCKET LAUNCHER?
702  // or rather, I know why, but see no fix
703  if(vlen(trace_endpos - trueaimpoint) > vlen(ma) + vlen(mi) + 1)
704  // yes, this is an ugly hack... but it seems good enough to find out whether the test hits the same place as the initial trace
705  return SHOTTYPE_HITOBSTRUCTION;
706 #endif
707 
708  return SHOTTYPE_HITWORLD;
709 }
MAX_SHOT_DISTANCE
const int MAX_SHOT_DISTANCE

782 {
783  // accumulate damage with each stat update
784  static float damage_total_prev = 0;
785  float damage_total = STAT(DAMAGE_DEALT_TOTAL);
786  float unaccounted_damage_new = COMPARE_INCREASING(damage_total, damage_total_prev);
787  damage_total_prev = damage_total;
788 
789  static float damage_dealt_time_prev = 0;
790  float damage_dealt_time = STAT(HIT_TIME);
791  if (damage_dealt_time != damage_dealt_time_prev)
792  {
793  unaccounted_damage += unaccounted_damage_new;
794  LOG_TRACE("dmg total: ", ftos(unaccounted_damage), " (+", ftos(unaccounted_damage_new), ")");
795  }
796  damage_dealt_time_prev = damage_dealt_time;
797 
798  // prevent hitsound when switching spectatee
799  static float spectatee_status_prev = 0;
800  if (spectatee_status != spectatee_status_prev)
801  unaccounted_damage = 0;

285 {
286  if(!activeweapon || !autocvar_r_drawviewmodel)
287  return;
288  int mask = (intermission || (STAT(HEALTH) <= 0) || autocvar_chase_active) ? 0 : MASK_NORMAL;
289  float a = this.alpha;
290  static bool wasinvehicle;
291  bool invehicle = player_localentnum > maxclients;
292  if (invehicle) a = -1;
293  else if (wasinvehicle) a = 1;
294  wasinvehicle = invehicle;
295  Weapon wep = activeweapon;
296  int c = entcs_GetClientColors(current_player);
297  vector g = weaponentity_glowmod(wep, NULL, c);
298  entity me = CSQCModel_server2csqc(player_localentnum - 1);
299  int fx = ((me.csqcmodel_effects & EFMASK_CHEAP)
300  | EF_NODEPTHTEST)
301  &~ (EF_FULLBRIGHT); // can mask team color, so get rid of it
302  for (entity e = this; e; e = e.weaponchild)
303  {
304  e.drawmask = mask;
305  e.alpha = a;
306  e.colormap = 256 + c; // colormap == 0 is black, c == 0 is white
307  e.glowmod = g;
308  e.csqcmodel_effects = fx;
309  CSQCModel_Effects_Apply(e);
310  }
311  {
312  static string name_last;
313  string name = wep.mdl;
314  bool swap = name != name_last;
315  // if (swap)
316  {
317  name_last = name;
318  CL_WeaponEntity_SetModel(this, name, swap);
319  this.viewmodel_origin = this.origin;
320  this.viewmodel_angles = this.angles;
321  }
322  anim_update(this);
323  if (!this.animstate_override && !this.animstate_looping)
324  anim_set(this, this.anim_idle, true, false, false);
325  }
326  float f = 0; // 0..1; 0: fully active
327  float rate = STAT(WEAPONRATEFACTOR);
328  float eta = rate ? ((this.weapon_nextthink - time) / rate) : 0;
329  if (eta <= 0) f = this.weapon_eta_last;
330  else switch (this.state)
331  {
332  case WS_RAISE:
333  {
334  f = eta / max(eta, this.weapon_switchdelay);
335  break;
336  }
337  case WS_DROP:
338  {
339  f = 1 - eta / max(eta, this.weapon_switchdelay);
340  break;
341  }
342  case WS_CLEAR:
343  {
344  f = 1;
345  break;
346  }
347  }
348  this.weapon_eta_last = f;
349  this.origin = this.viewmodel_origin;
350  this.angles = this.viewmodel_angles;
351  this.angles_x = (-90 * f * f);
352  viewmodel_animate(this);
353  setorigin(this, this.origin);
354 }
